_trn_missing_java_text: For an optimal experience, we suggest letting us take care of Java for you. Only manually manage Java if you know what you're doing, it may result in Nokiatis Launcher not working!
_trn_select_required_java_text: Select the required paths to Java. Java 8 is used for all the versions < 1.17
_trn_java_description_text: Javas refer to specific java binary paths.
_trn_java_description_local_text: [LOCAL] means that the java is installed in your computer and was automatically detected.
_trn_java_description_managed_text: [MANAGED] means that the java is managed by Nokiatis Launcher. You can also install managed versions from the launcher.
_trn_java_description_custom_text: [CUSTOM] means that the java was manually added by you
_trn_profiles_description_text: Profiles are a way to manage java versions and arguments for different instances.
_trn_auto_manage_java_system_profiles_te: If enabled, Nokiatis Launcher will automatically manage the system java profiles. If a java profile has no valid java path, it will automatically download it.
_trn_no_available_javas: No Java available for this vendor
_trn_tooltip_valid_path: This java path works and is valid
_trn_tooltip_invalid_path: This java path doesn't seem to work
_trn_runtime_path_text: Select the path where the instances and configuration files will be stored. This is useful if you want to store the instances in a different drive
_trn_instance_settings.prepend_global_ja: Prepend global Java arguments before instance extra Java arguments ({GLOBAL_JAVA_ARGS} below)
_trn_profile_used_in_mc_versions: This profile is used in the following Minecraft versions
_trn_confirm_change_runtime_path_text: Are you sure you want to change the runtime path? This will move all your instances and configuration files to the new path.
_trn_confirm_change_runtime_path_already: Are you sure you want to change the runtime path? Since the target folder is already in use, this will simply switch the runtime path configuration and no files will be moved or copied.
_trn_do_not_close_app: Do not close the app. It will restart automatically once it's done.
_trn_migration_errored: Runtime path migration failed. State might be corrupted. Click <0>here</0> for more info on how to proceed.
